overview: This dragonfly appears to be a species from the Libellulidae family, commonly known as skimmers. It is depicted in flight with dark, transparent wings, characteristic of many glider or saddlebag species. Dragonflies like this one are predatory insects, typically hunting other flying insects while on the wing. iNaturalist +4 5 sites Metallic Pennant (Idiataphe cubensis) · iNaturalist Metallic Pennant (Idiataphe cubensis) · iNaturalist.
